pricing.title: Tutoring Packages
pricing.subtitle: Quality tutoring starting from €75 per hour - Online or at Science Park

questions.question: How long are the tutoring sessions?
questions.answer: Standard sessions are 1 hour long, but we can accommodate longer sessions if needed.

questions.question: Can I change my tutor if I'm not satisfied?
questions.answer: Yes, we want you to have the best learning experience. You can request a different tutor at any time.

questions.question: Do you offer online sessions?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer both online and in-person tutoring sessions to accommodate your preferences.

contact.title: Start Your Learning Journey
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

locations.title: Where We Teach
locations.subtitle: Lessons at Science Park or online. Available for students across Amsterdam.
locations.areas: Amsterdam Zuid, Centrum, Noord, West & Oost

weekend.title: Weekend Tutoring Zuidoost
weekend.description: Saturday and Sunday lessons at HvA in Amsterdam Zuidoost. Half price of regular rates.
